commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Creates and deploys a new service remotely to Azure based on provided schema.

options.name: --schema
options.description: The path to the xml schema file.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Launches a mock service locally based on specified schema.

options.description: Show help information

options.name: --schema

options.name: --port
options.description: The port to bind the local server to.

options.description: Whether to seed the database with random data
